title: Letter of Authority (LOA). The LMA shall notify the Department of the
content: 19 participation of an accredited principal/employer or its registered/authorized 20 representative in a recruitment activity within its registered office, at least three (3) 21 working days before the date of the activity. If the accredited principal/employer or its 22 registered authorized representative shall participate in a recruitment activity outside its 23 registered office, the application for LOA shall be filed at least three (3) working days 24 before the date of the activity. 25 26
